$l10n.text: Now you can highlight your PDFs!
With our new highlighter tool, you can read and edit PDFs in one place.
$l10n.comment: This string appears below an image of a document with important parts highlighted.

$l10n.text: Make Firefox your default PDF editor?
You’ll have access to our tools every time you open a PDF.
Now you can highlight your PDFs!
With our new highlighter tool, you can read and edit PDFs in one place.
$l10n.comment: This string appears below an image of a document with important parts highlighted.

pdf-annotations-highlight-treatment-b-ro.userFacingName: PDF Annotations - Highlight - Treatment B Rollout
pdf-annotations-highlight-treatment-b-ro.userFacingDescription: This experiment displays a message in the PDF viewer that introduces the highlight toolbar button, and offers users a way to set Firefox as the default PDF handler, if it is not already.

de.screen-1-header: Hervorhebung in PDFs ist ab sofort möglich!
de.screen-2-subtitle: Sie haben jedes Mal Zugriff auf unsere Werkzeuge, wenn Sie eine PDF-Datei öffnen.
de.screen-1-variant-2-subtitle: Mit unserem neuen Textmarker-Werkzeug können Sie PDFs an einem Ort lesen und bearbeiten.

fr.screen-1-header: Vous pouvez désormais surligner vos PDF !
fr.screen-2-header: Faire de Firefox votre éditeur PDF par défaut ?
fr.screen-2-subtitle: Vous aurez accès à nos outils à chaque fois que vous ouvrirez un fichier PDF.
fr.screen-1-variant-2-subtitle: Avec notre nouvel outil de surlignage, vous pouvez consulter et modifier des fichiers PDF sans avoir besoin d’un autre logiciel.

it.screen-1-header: Ora puoi evidenziare i tuoi PDF!
it.screen-2-header: Impostare Firefox come editor predefinito per i PDF?
it.screen-2-subtitle: Avrai accesso ai nostri strumenti ogni volta che apri un PDF.
it.feature-tour-submenu-item-1: Non mostrare di nuovo questo suggerimento
it.screen-1-variant-2-subtitle: Grazie al nuovo strumento evidenziatore puoi leggere e modificare i PDF senza bisogno di altri software.

content.promoTitle: VPNs aren’t all the same. Some simply aren’t secure. Some log your activity. But Mozilla VPN is different — it’s open source and backed by a company with a track record of putting people and their privacy first.

mozilla-vpn-in-private-browsing-treatmen.userFacingName: Mozilla VPN in Private Browsing - Treatment D Rollout (EN only)
mozilla-vpn-in-private-browsing-treatmen.userFacingDescription:
This is a rollout for the most successful treatment of the Mozilla VPN messaging experiment on PBM (Treatment D):
https://experimenter.services.mozilla.com/nimbus/mozilla-vpn-in-private-browsing/

This rollout is English only and will be followed by another rollout for German, French and Italian:
https://experimenter.services.mozilla.com/nimbus/mozilla-vpn-in-private-browsing-de-fr-it-copy/

$l10n.text: You’re signed out. Click the Account icon to sign in.
$l10n.comment: The 'account icon' is the toolbar button with a 'profile' icon of a human head/shoulders. It's for dealing with your Mozilla account. When hovering the icon, the tooltip says 'Account'

login-status-advisory-callout-rollout.userFacingDescription: Adds a tooltip notification indicating the Mozilla account login status for users who may think they are signed in, but are actually signed out.

de.login-status-advisory-title-a: Sie sind abgemeldet. Klicken Sie auf das Kontosymbol, um sich anzumelden.
de.login-status-advisory-title-b: Beginnen Sie mit der Synchronisation Ihrer Daten. Klicken Sie auf das Kontosymbol, um sich anzumelden.

fr.login-status-advisory-title-a: Votre compte est déconnecté. Cliquez sur l’icône de compte pour vous connecter.
fr.login-status-advisory-title-b: Commencez à synchroniser vos données. Cliquez sur l’icône de compte pour vous connecter.

en-CA.login-status-advisory-title-a: You’re signed out. Click the account icon to sign in.
en-CA.login-status-advisory-title-b: Start syncing your data. Click the account icon to sign in.

multiple-profile-switching-rollout-v2.userFacingDescription: This feature makes it easier to create and manage different profiles.  This allows you to separate and protect your online life with a set of unique personal and task-based identities, created and defined by you, all in Firefox.

de.welcome-back-spotlight-subtitle: Willkommen zurück beim einzigen großen Browser, der von einer gemeinnützigen Organisation unterstützt wird. Wir unternehmen zusätzliche Schritte, um Ihre Daten zu schützen, egal wo Sie sich befinden.

fr.welcome-back-spotlight-subtitle: Bon retour sur le seul navigateur majeur soutenu par une organisation à but non lucratif. Nous prenons des mesures supplémentaires pour protéger vos données, où que vous soyez.
fr.welcome-back-embedded-import-title: Transférez vos données et personnalisez Firefox pour qu’il vous ressemble

it.welcome-back-spotlight-subtitle: Bentornato nell’unico dei principali browser supportato da un’organizzazione senza fini di lucro. Proteggiamo i tuoi dati con ancora più attenzione, ovunque tu navighi.
it.welcome-back-embedded-import-title: Importa i tuoi dati e sentiti subito a casa con Firefox

optimize-multi-actiontail-fox-modals-for.userFacingName: Optimize multi-action/tail fox modals for existing users V2
optimize-multi-actiontail-fox-modals-for.userFacingDescription: Updates to existing browser-open experience after profile age hits 7 days and user has completed a previous session.

de.welcome-back-spotlight-subtitle: Willkommen zurück beim einzigen großen Browser, der von einer gemeinnützigen Organisation unterstützt wird. Wir unternehmen zusätzliche Schritte, um Ihre Daten zu schützen, egal wo Sie sich befinden.
de.welcome-back-embedded-import-title: Importieren Sie Ihre Daten, damit Sie sich mit Firefox wie zu Hause fühlen

fr.welcome-back-spotlight-subtitle: Bon retour sur le seul navigateur majeur soutenu par une organisation à but non lucratif. Nous prenons des mesures supplémentaires pour protéger vos données, où que vous soyez.
fr.welcome-back-embedded-import-title: Transférez vos données et personnalisez Firefox pour qu’il vous ressemble

it.welcome-back-spotlight-subtitle: Bentornato nell’unico dei principali browser supportato da un’organizzazione senza fini di lucro. Proteggiamo i tuoi dati con ancora più attenzione, ovunque tu navighi.
it.welcome-back-embedded-import-title: Importa i tuoi dati e sentiti subito a casa con Firefox

multiple-profile-switching-rollout-featu.userFacingName: Multiple Profile Switching Rollout Feature only
multiple-profile-switching-rollout-featu.userFacingDescription: This feature makes it easier to create and manage different profiles.  This allows you to separate and protect your online life with a set of unique personal and task-based identities, created and defined by you, all in Firefox.

messages.targeting: messageImpressions.NEW_SELECTABLE_PROFILE_SPOTLIGHT[messageImpressions.NEW_SELECTABLE_PROFILE_SPOTLIGHT | length - 1] < currentDate|date - 604800000 && canCreateSelectableProfiles && !hasSelectableProfiles && !willShowDefaultPrompt && !activeNotifications && source == 'newtab' && previousSessionEnd && !hasActiveEnterprisePolicies && ((currentDate|date - profileAgeCreated) / 604800000) > 3

multiple-profile-switching-rollout-messa.userFacingName: Multiple Profile Switching Rollout Messages only
multiple-profile-switching-rollout-messa.userFacingDescription: This feature makes it easier to create and manage different profiles.  This allows you to separate and protect your online life with a set of unique personal and task-based identities, created and defined by you, all in Firefox.

smart-shortcuts-v3-lr2-no-lr-rollout.userFacingDescription: Adjusting presentation of shortcuts (topsites) displayed based on user's prior shortcut interactions and frecency.

enable-ohttp-for-mars-communications-on-.userFacingName: Enable OHTTP for MARS communications on Release
enable-ohttp-for-mars-communications-on-.userFacingDescription: Enables OHTTP for communicating with MARS from New Tab on Firefox Release.

split-view-onboarding.userFacingDescription: This experiment encourages users to try the new Split View feature, which is helpful for multitasking and viewing two sources of information side by side.

anti-fingerprinting-research-characteris.userFacingDescription: Developing Anti-Fingerprinting analysis to ensure user hardware does not appear unique.

disable-legacy-top-sites-ping-by-default.userFacingName: Disable legacy top-sites ping by default
disable-legacy-top-sites-ping-by-default.userFacingDescription: Disables a legacy Glean ping that is no longer being used or actively monitored for changes.

fox-doodle-multi-action-cta-2025-dummy-r.userFacingName: Fox Doodle Multi-Action CTA 2025 - Dummy Rollout V2
fox-doodle-multi-action-cta-2025-dummy-r.userFacingDescription: Rollout: content cleanup, no message content

$l10n.text: Firefox helps pages load faster and tabs feel smoother to keep up with the way you browse.
Firefox blocks most trackers automatically, so you can browse with more privacy and control.
Get protections built into every new tab
Firefox helps you block distracting ads, organize your tabs, and keep videos in view without switching tabs.

kitified-value-prop-experiments-on-new-t.userFacingName: Kitified value prop experiments on New Tab - countries with no content
kitified-value-prop-experiments-on-new-t.userFacingDescription: This experiment displays Kitified messages on the newtab page highlighting Firefox's core value propositions.

de.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Mit Firefox können Sie störende Werbung blockieren, Tabs organisieren und Videos im Auge behalten, ohne Tabs zu wechseln.
de.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Firefox hilft dabei, dass Seiten schneller geladen werden und Tabs flüssiger laufen, um mit Ihrer Art zu Surfen Schritt zuhalten.
de.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox blockiert die meisten Tracker automatisch, damit Sie mit mehr Privatsphäre und Kontrolle surfen können.

fr.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Firefox vous permet de bloquer les publicités intrusives, de mieux gérer vos onglets et de garder un œil sur des vidéos sans avoir besoin de changer d’onglet.
fr.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Firefox accélère le chargement des pages et facilite l’affichage des onglets pour s’adapter à votre navigation.
fr.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox bloque la majorité des traqueurs automatiquement, vous permettant ainsi de naviguer avec davantage de confidentialité et de contrôle.
fr.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-he: Obtenez des protections intégrées à chaque nouvel onglet

it.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Con Firefox puoi bloccare le pubblicità invasive, gestire facilmente le tue schede e continuare a guardare i video senza cambiare scheda.
it.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Con Firefox le pagine si caricano più velocemente e le schede sono più fluide per restare al passo con la tua navigazione.
it.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox blocca automaticamente la maggior parte degli elementi traccianti, così puoi navigare con maggiore privacy e controllo.
it.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-he: Protezioni integrata in ogni nuova scheda

en-CA.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Firefox helps you block distracting ads, organize your tabs, and keep videos in view without switching tabs.
en-CA.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Firefox helps pages load faster and tabs feel smoother to keep up with the way you browse.
en-CA.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox blocks most trackers automatically, so you can browse with more privacy and control.
en-CA.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-he: Get protections built into every new tab

dtls-12-rollout-rollback-for-webrtc-cont.userFacingName: DTLS 1.2 rollout (rollback?) for webrtc - control Rollout
dtls-12-rollout-rollback-for-webrtc-cont.userFacingDescription: Set maximum DTLS version to 1.2 for webrtc, due to interoperability issues with 1.3.

disable-security-pref-firefox-150.userFacingDescription: This is an Incident Response Pref Flip designed to disable security.ssl3.ecdhe_ecdsa_aes_128_sha security pref in Firefox 150 due to user reports of Yahoo search results not loading
